name: Kahuku Farms
tagline: A real working farm on the North Shore with tractor tours, fruit tastings, and the best acai bowl on the island.
parking: Free parking on-site along the farm road
bestTime: Late morning for farm tours; the cafe gets a long line at lunch so go early or late
talkStory: The Matsuda family has farmed this North Shore land for generations, growing banana, papaya, lilikoi, cacao, and seasonal fruits across 10 acres. The tractor-pulled farm tour lets kids taste fruit right off the trees -- apple bananas and white pineapple are standouts. Their cafe's grilled banana bread with haupia ice cream is island-famous. The farm also grows cacao used in some of Oahu's small-batch chocolate.
